# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
metadata:
  description: Creates a Service Principal with least-privilege role assignments for CI/CD pipeline
  securityControls:
    - Implements least privilege access
    - Uses custom role instead of broad Contributor
    - Scoped to resource group level
    - Requires explicit resource type permissions
    - Audit logging enabled
parameters:
  servicePrincipalName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name for the Service Principal
  targetResourceGroupName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Resource group where deployments will occur
  allowedResourceTypes:
    type: array
    defaultValue:
      - Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
      - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      - Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
      - Microsoft.Web/sites
      - Microsoft.Sql/servers
    metadata:
      description: Specific resource types the pipeline can deploy
  enableAuditLogging:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable audit logging for role assignments
  deploymentEnvironment:
    type: string
    allowedValues:
      - Development
      - Staging
      - Production
    metadata:
      description: Environment designation for additional controls
  maxRoleAssignmentDuration:
    type: string
    defaultValue: P90D
    metadata:
      description: Maximum duration for role assignment (ISO 8601 format)
variables:
  customRoleName: '[concat(parameters(''servicePrincipalName''), ''-CICDRole-'', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]'
  roleDefinitionId: '[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables(''customRoleName''))]'
  resourceGroupScope: '[resourceGroup().id]'
  allowedActions: [
    'Microsoft.Resources/deployments/*'
    'Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/resourceGroups/read'
  ]
  resourceTypeActions: '[concat(variables(''allowedActions''), createArray(concat(parameters(''allowedResourceTypes'')[0], ''/*'')))]'
  notActions: [
    'Microsoft.Authorization/*/Delete'
    'Microsoft.Authorization/*/Write'
    'Microsoft.Authorization/elevateAccess/Action'
    'Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments/write'
    'Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments/delete'
    'Microsoft.Compute/galleries/share/action'
    'Microsoft.Security/*/Delete'
    'Microsoft.Security/*/Write'
  ]
  productionRestrictions: '[if(equals(parameters(''deploymentEnvironment''), ''Production''), createArray(''Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/delete'', ''Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/delete''), createArray())]'
  finalNotActions: '[concat(variables(''notActions''), variables(''productionRestrictions''))]'
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions
    apiVersion: 2022-04-01
    name: '[variables(''roleDefinitionId'')]'
    properties:
      roleName: '[variables(''customRoleName'')]'
      description: 'Custom least-privilege role for CI/CD pipeline with restricted permissions'
      type: CustomRole
      permissions:
        - actions: '[union(variables(''allowedActions''), map(parameters(''allowedResourceTypes''), lambda(''rt'', concat(lambdaVariables(''rt''), ''/*''))))]'
          notActions: '[variables(''finalNotActions'')]'
          dataActions: []
          notDataActions: []
      assignableScopes:
        - '[variables(''resourceGroupScope'')]'
  - type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities
    apiVersion: 2023-01-31
    name: '[parameters(''servicePrincipalName'')]'
    location: '[resourceGroup().location]'
    properties: {}
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2022-04-01
    name: '[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters(''servicePrincipalName''), variables(''customRoleName''))]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions'', variables(''roleDefinitionId''))]'
      - '[resourceId(''Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities'', parameters(''servicePrincipalName''))]'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions'', variables(''roleDefinitionId''))]'
      principalId: '[reference(resourceId(''Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities'', parameters(''servicePrincipalName'')), ''2023-01-31'').principalId]'
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      scope: '[variables(''resourceGroupScope'')]'
      description: 'CI/CD pipeline role assignment with least privilege access'
      condition: '[concat(''@Resource[Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/resourceGroups:'', parameters(''targetResourceGroupName''), '']'')]'
  - type: Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings
    apiVersion: 2021-05-01-preview
    name: '[concat(parameters(''servicePrincipalName''), ''-audit'')]'
    condition: '[parameters(''enableAuditLogging'')]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'', guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters(''servicePrincipalName''), variables(''customRoleName'')))]'
    properties:
      logs:
        - category: Administrative
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
        - category: Security
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
      metrics: []
    scope: '[resourceGroup().id]'
outputs:
  servicePrincipalId:
    type: string
    value: '[reference(resourceId(''Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities'', parameters(''servicePrincipalName'')), ''2023-01-31'').principalId]'
  servicePrincipalClientId:
    type: string
    value: '[reference(resourceId(''Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities'', parameters(''servicePrincipalName'')), ''2023-01-31'').clientId]'
  customRoleId:
    type: string
    value: '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions'', variables(''roleDefinitionId''))]'
  roleAssignmentScope:
    type: string
    value: '[variables(''resourceGroupScope'')]'
  securityNotes:
    type: string
    value: 'Service Principal created with least-privilege custom role scoped to resource group. Review allowedResourceTypes parameter to restrict further.'
